fields.title: Introduction to Data Structures
fields.description: Overview of data structures, types, and importance in computer science.

fields.title: Arrays – Basics & Operations
fields.description: Array declaration, indexing, traversal, insertion and deletion operations.

fields.title: Linked Lists – Singly & Doubly
fields.description: Singly linked list, doubly linked list, circular linked list with operations.

fields.title: Stacks – Implementation & Applications
fields.description: Stack using arrays and linked list, push/pop, balanced parentheses, postfix evaluation.

fields.title: Queues – Types & Circular Queue
fields.description: Queue, circular queue, deque, priority queue with real-world applications.

fields.title: Trees – Binary Tree & BST
fields.description: Binary tree traversals (inorder, preorder, postorder), BST insert/delete/search.

fields.title: AVL Trees & Balancing
fields.description: AVL tree rotations, height balancing, insertion and deletion with rotations.

fields.title: Graphs – BFS & DFS
fields.description: Graph representation (adjacency matrix/list), BFS, DFS, and applications.

fields.title: Sorting Algorithms – Bubble, Merge, Quick
fields.description: Bubble sort, selection sort, insertion sort, merge sort, quick sort with complexity analysis.

fields.title: Hashing & Hash Tables
fields.description: Hash functions, collision resolution (chaining, open addressing), load factor.

fields.title: Python Introduction & Setup
fields.description: Introduction to Python, installation, IDLE, first program, variables and data types.

fields.title: Control Flow – if/else, loops
fields.description: Conditional statements, for loops, while loops, break, continue, pass.

fields.title: Functions & Recursion
fields.description: Defining functions, arguments, return values, *args, **kwargs, lambda, recursion.

fields.title: Lists, Tuples, Sets & Dictionaries
fields.description: Python collections: list operations, tuple immutability, set operations, dictionary methods.

fields.title: Object-Oriented Programming
fields.description: Classes, objects, __init__, inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, method overriding.

fields.title: File Handling & Exception Handling
fields.description: Reading/writing files, with statement, try/except/finally, custom exceptions.

fields.title: Modules, Packages & pip
fields.description: Creating modules, importing, standard library (os, sys, math, datetime), pip and virtual envs.

fields.title: Comprehensions, Generators & Decorators
fields.description: List/dict/set comprehensions, generator functions, yield, decorators and functools.

fields.title: Regular Expressions in Python
fields.description: re module, patterns, match, search, findall, groups, substitution.

fields.title: Database Connectivity with SQLite
fields.description: sqlite3 module, creating tables, CRUD operations, parameterised queries, connection handling.

fields.title: HTML5 – Structure & Semantic Tags
fields.description: HTML5 document structure, semantic tags (header, nav, section, article, footer), forms, tables.

fields.title: CSS3 – Selectors, Box Model & Flexbox
fields.description: CSS selectors, specificity, box model, flexbox layout, media queries, pseudo-classes.

fields.title: CSS Grid & Responsive Design
fields.description: CSS Grid system, grid template, responsive design principles, mobile-first approach.

fields.title: Bootstrap 5 – Layouts & Components
fields.description: Bootstrap 5 grid system, utility classes, navbar, cards, modals, forms, and responsive utilities.

fields.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
fields.description: Variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, arrays, objects, ES6 features.

fields.title: Fetch API & AJAX
fields.description: Asynchronous JavaScript, fetch API, promises, async/await, JSON, REST API consumption.

fields.title: Introduction to Django Framework
fields.description: Django MVT architecture, models, views, templates, URL routing, ORM basics.

fields.title: REST APIs – Design & Implementation
fields.description: REST principles, HTTP methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), status codes, API design, Django REST framework intro.

fields.title: Web Security – XSS, CSRF & SQL Injection
fields.description: Common web vulnerabilities, OWASP Top 10, CSRF tokens, input sanitization, HTTPS.

fields.title: Introduction to Computer Networks
fields.description: Definition, types of networks (LAN, WAN, MAN), network topologies, transmission media.

fields.title: OSI Model – 7 Layers Explained
fields.description: All 7 OSI layers, functions, protocols at each layer, data encapsulation/decapsulation.

fields.title: TCP/IP Model & Protocols
fields.description: TCP/IP 4-layer model, comparison with OSI, TCP vs UDP, IP protocol, ICMP.

fields.title: IP Addressing & Subnetting
fields.description: IPv4 addressing, classes (A/B/C/D/E), subnet mask, CIDR notation, subnetting calculations.

fields.title: Routing & Switching
fields.description: Static vs dynamic routing, routing algorithms (RIP, OSPF, BGP), switching techniques, VLANs.

fields.title: DNS, DHCP & HTTP/HTTPS
fields.description: DNS resolution process, DHCP lease, HTTP request/response cycle, HTTPS and TLS/SSL.

fields.title: Network Security Fundamentals
fields.description: Firewalls, VPN, encryption (symmetric & asymmetric), PKI, network attacks and countermeasures.

fields.title: Wireless Networks – WiFi & Cellular
fields.description: IEEE 802.11 standards (WiFi), CSMA/CA, cellular networks (3G/4G/5G), WPA2 security.

fields.title: Socket Programming in Python
fields.description: TCP sockets, creating client-server programs in Python, socket functions, error handling.

fields.title: NumPy – Arrays & Numerical Computing
fields.description: NumPy arrays, indexing, slicing, broadcasting, mathematical operations, linear algebra.

fields.title: Pandas – DataFrames & Data Manipulation
fields.description: Series, DataFrame, loading data, indexing, filtering, groupby, merge, join, pivot tables.

fields.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib
fields.description: Line plots, bar charts, histograms, scatter plots, subplots, customization, saving figures.

fields.title: Seaborn – Statistical Visualization
fields.description: Seaborn plots: heatmap, boxplot, violin plot, pairplot, distribution plots for EDA.

fields.title: Statistics for Data Science
fields.description: Descriptive statistics, probability, distributions (normal, binomial), hypothesis testing, p-values.

fields.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
fields.description: EDA workflow, data profiling, missing value analysis, outlier detection, correlation analysis.

fields.title: Data Cleaning & Feature Engineering
fields.description: Handling missing data, encoding categorical variables, feature scaling, feature selection, new feature creation.

fields.title: Time Series Analysis
fields.description: Time series components, trend, seasonality, autocorrelation, ARIMA model, forecasting.

fields.title: Introduction to Machine Learning with Scikit-learn
fields.description: ML workflow in scikit-learn, train/test split, pipelines, cross-validation, model evaluation metrics.

fields.title: Introduction to AI & Machine Learning
fields.description: AI vs ML vs Deep Learning, types of ML (supervised/unsupervised/reinforcement), real-world applications.

fields.title: Supervised Learning Overview
fields.description: Regression vs classification, training/testing, overfitting, underfitting, bias-variance tradeoff.

fields.title: Linear Regression – Theory & Implementation
fields.description: Simple & multiple linear regression, gradient descent, cost function, scikit-learn implementation.

fields.title: Logistic Regression & Classification
fields.description: Logistic function, sigmoid, binary and multi-class classification, confusion matrix, ROC curve.

fields.title: Decision Trees & Random Forest
fields.description: Decision tree splitting criteria (Gini, entropy), pruning, random forest bagging, feature importance.

fields.title: Support Vector Machines (SVM)
fields.description: SVM concept, hyperplane, margin, kernel trick (linear, RBF, polynomial), classification examples.

fields.title: Unsupervised Learning – K-Means Clustering
fields.description: K-means algorithm, centroid initialization, elbow method, cluster evaluation, PCA for visualization.

fields.title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning Basics
fields.description: Perceptron, multi-layer neural network, activation functions, backpropagation, gradient descent.

fields.title: Model Evaluation & Cross-Validation
fields.description: Accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, ROC-AUC, k-fold cross-validation, hyperparameter tuning.

fields.title: Natural Language Processing – Introduction
fields.description: NLP tasks, tokenization, stop words, stemming, lemmatization, TF-IDF, bag of words, sentiment analysis.

fields.title: Heap Data Structure & Priority Queue
fields.description: Min-heap, max-heap, heapify, insert/delete, heap sort, and priority queue applications.

fields.title: Trie Data Structure
fields.description: Trie insert, search, delete, prefix search, autocomplete applications, word frequency counting.

fields.title: Segment Trees & Fenwick Trees
fields.description: Range query, point update, segment tree build/query/update, Fenwick (Binary Indexed) tree.

fields.title: Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find)
fields.description: Union by rank, path compression, applications in Kruskal MST and cycle detection.

fields.title: Dynamic Programming – Intro & Memoisation
fields.description: Overlapping subproblems, optimal substructure, top-down (memo) vs bottom-up (tabulation).

fields.title: Graph Shortest Path – Dijkstra & Bellman-Ford
fields.description: Dijkstra single-source shortest path, Bellman-Ford with negative weights, SSSP comparison.

fields.title: Minimum Spanning Tree – Prim & Kruskal
fields.description: MST concepts, Prim greedy approach, Kruskal with union-find, complexity analysis.

fields.title: Backtracking – N-Queens & Sudoku Solver
fields.description: Backtracking paradigm, N-Queens problem, Sudoku solver, subset sum, constraint satisfaction.

fields.title: Concurrency – Threading & Multiprocessing
fields.description: GIL, threading module, thread synchronisation, multiprocessing module, ProcessPoolExecutor.

fields.title: Asyncio & Asynchronous Programming
fields.description: Event loop, coroutines, async/await, asyncio tasks, aiohttp for async HTTP requests.

fields.title: NumPy for Python Developers
fields.description: NumPy arrays, vectorised operations, broadcasting, reshape, stacking, mathematical functions.

fields.title: Web Scraping with BeautifulSoup & Requests
fields.description: HTTP requests library, BeautifulSoup parsing, CSS selectors, scraping tables, handling pagination.

fields.title: Unit Testing with pytest
fields.description: Writing test functions, fixtures, parametrize, mock, test coverage, TDD approach.

fields.title: Design Patterns in Python
fields.description: Creational (Singleton, Factory, Builder), Structural (Decorator, Adapter), Behavioural (Observer, Strategy).

fields.title: Python Data Classes & Type Hints
fields.description: Type annotations, typing module, dataclasses, NamedTuple, Protocol, mypy static type checking.

fields.title: Working with APIs – REST & JSON
fields.description: requests library, GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, authentication (API key, OAuth), JSON parsing, rate limits.

fields.title: React.js – Components & State Management
fields.description: React components, JSX, props, state, hooks (useState, useEffect), component lifecycle.

fields.title: Node.js & Express – Backend Development
fields.description: Node.js event loop, npm, Express routes, middleware, REST API with Express, error handling.

fields.title: MongoDB & Mongoose – NoSQL Database
fields.description: MongoDB documents, collections, CRUD, Mongoose schema, models, validation, population.

fields.title: Authentication – JWT & Sessions
fields.description: Session-based vs token-based auth, JWT structure, signing/verifying, refresh tokens, OAuth 2.0 basics.

fields.title: CSS Animations & Transitions
fields.description: CSS transitions, keyframe animations, transform, perspective, animation timing functions.

fields.title: TypeScript for Web Developers
fields.description: TypeScript basics, types, interfaces, generics, enums, strict mode, compiling TS to JS.

fields.title: Web Performance Optimisation
fields.description: Lighthouse metrics, lazy loading, code splitting, caching, CDN, image optimisation, Core Web Vitals.

fields.title: Docker for Web Developers
fields.description: Containers vs VMs, Dockerfile, docker-compose, multi-stage builds, deploying Django/Node apps.

fields.title: IPv6 – Structure, Addressing & Transition
fields.description: IPv6 128-bit addressing, notation, header format, ICMPv6, NDP, transition mechanisms (dual stack, tunnelling).

fields.title: TCP – Three-Way Handshake & Flow Control
fields.description: TCP connection establishment, SYN/ACK, flow control (sliding window), congestion control (slow start, AIMD).

fields.title: Network Address Translation (NAT)
fields.description: NAT types (static, dynamic, PAT/NAT overload), how NAT works, advantages and limitations.

fields.title: VPN – Virtual Private Networks
fields.description: VPN types (site-to-site, remote access), tunnelling protocols (IPSec, OpenVPN, WireGuard), use cases.

fields.title: Network Troubleshooting Tools
fields.description: ping, traceroute, nslookup, dig, netstat, Wireshark basics, tcpdump, iperf network diagnostics.

fields.title: Cloud Networking – AWS VPC Basics
fields.description: AWS VPC, subnets (public/private), internet gateway, NAT gateway, security groups, NACLs.

fields.title: Software-Defined Networking (SDN)
fields.description: SDN architecture, control plane vs data plane separation, OpenFlow, NFV, SD-WAN concepts.

fields.title: Network Forensics & Packet Analysis
fields.description: Wireshark deep dive: capturing packets, display filters, protocol dissection, finding anomalies.

fields.title: Advanced Pandas – MultiIndex & Window Functions
fields.description: Multi-level indexing, stack/unstack, rolling windows, expanding windows, resample, custom aggregations.

fields.title: Data Pipeline with scikit-learn Pipeline
fields.description: ColumnTransformer, Pipeline, combining preprocessing and modelling, make_pipeline, grid search on pipelines.

fields.title: Feature Selection & Dimensionality Reduction
fields.description: Filter methods, wrapper methods, RFE, PCA, LDA, t-SNE, UMAP for high-dimensional data.

fields.title: SQL for Data Science
fields.description: SQL SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING, JOINs (INNER/LEFT/RIGHT), subqueries, window functions, CTEs.

fields.title: Web Scraping for Data Science
fields.description: Requests + BeautifulSoup, Selenium for dynamic pages, scraping ethics, storing scraped data in Pandas.

fields.title: Big Data Concepts – Hadoop & Spark Intro
fields.description: Big data 3Vs, HDFS, MapReduce, Apache Spark RDDs, DataFrames, PySpark intro, batch vs streaming.

fields.title: Dashboard Building with Plotly & Dash
fields.description: Plotly interactive charts, Dash framework, layout, callbacks, deploying a data dashboard.

fields.title: Data Ethics & Responsible AI
fields.description: Bias in ML models, fairness metrics, data privacy (GDPR), explainability (LIME, SHAP), responsible AI principles.

fields.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)
fields.description: CNN architecture, convolution, pooling, flattening, dense layers, image classification with Keras/TensorFlow.

fields.title: Recurrent Neural Networks & LSTM
fields.description: RNN architecture, vanishing gradient, LSTM gates (forget/input/output), sequence modelling, text generation.

fields.title: Transformer Architecture & Attention Mechanism
fields.description: Self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encoding, encoder-decoder, BERT and GPT overview.

fields.title: Transfer Learning & Fine-Tuning
fields.description: Pre-trained models (VGG, ResNet, BERT), freezing layers, fine-tuning, domain adaptation, Hugging Face intro.

fields.description: GridSearchCV, RandomizedSearchCV, Optuna Bayesian optimisation, early stopping, learning curves.

fields.description: Saving models with joblib/pickle, building REST API with Flask or FastAPI, JSON input/output, Docker deployment.

fields.description: GAN architecture (generator/discriminator), training dynamics, mode collapse, VAE latent space, DCGAN.

fields.title: Implement a Stack using Array
fields.description: Write a Python program implementing a stack using arrays with push, pop, and display operations.

fields.title: Python OOP Assignment
fields.description: Create a class hierarchy demonstrating inheritance and polymorphism.

fields.title: Build a Responsive Webpage
fields.description: Design a responsive webpage using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.

fields.title: Network Topology Report
fields.description: Write a detailed report comparing Bus, Star, and Ring topologies.

fields.title: EDA on a Dataset
fields.description: Perform exploratory data analysis on any publicly available dataset using Pandas and Matplotlib.

fields.title: ML Model Implementation
fields.description: Train a classification model using scikit-learn and evaluate it with accuracy and F1 score.

fields.title: Implement All List Operations
fields.description: Write a Python program to implement a singly linked list with insert at head, insert at tail, delete by value, reverse, and display operations. Test with at least 10 elements.

fields.title: Stack & Queue Applications
fields.description: Implement: (1) Stack to evaluate a postfix expression, (2) Queue to simulate a CPU scheduling algorithm (round-robin). Provide time and space complexity analysis.

fields.title: BST Operations & AVL Tree
fields.description: Implement a Binary Search Tree with insert, delete, search, and all three traversals. Extend it to an AVL tree with automatic balancing. Demonstrate with sample inputs.

fields.title: Python Data Structures Program
fields.description: Write Python programs to demonstrate: (1) list comprehension to filter primes, (2) dictionary to count word frequency in a paragraph, (3) set operations on two student lists.

fields.title: OOP Mini Project – Library Management
fields.description: Design a Library Management System using OOP. Classes: Book, Member, Library. Implement: add_book, remove_book, issue_book, return_book, display_available. Use inheritance and encapsulation.

fields.title: File Processing & Exception Handling
fields.description: Write a Python program that: (1) Reads a CSV file of student marks, (2) Calculates average, max, min, pass/fail, (3) Writes a summary report to a new file, (4) Handles all possible file and value exceptions.

fields.title: Responsive Portfolio Website
fields.description: Build a fully responsive personal portfolio website using HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap 5. Must include: navigation bar, hero section, about section, skills section, projects section, contact form. Must work on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

fields.title: JavaScript Interactive Web App
fields.description: Build an interactive To-Do List application using vanilla JavaScript. Features: add task, delete task, mark complete, filter by status, save to localStorage. No frameworks allowed.

fields.title: Django CRUD Web Application
fields.description: Build a simple Student Record Management web application using Django. Features: add student, view all students, edit student, delete student, search by name. Use Bootstrap for UI.

fields.title: Subnetting Practice Problems
fields.description: Solve 10 subnetting problems: given a network address, subnet mask, calculate (1) number of subnets, (2) hosts per subnet, (3) valid host range, (4) broadcast address. Show all working steps.

fields.title: Client-Server Socket Program
fields.description: Write a Python client-server application using TCP sockets: (1) Server accepts connections, echoes messages back, (2) Client sends 5 messages and displays responses, (3) Handle disconnection gracefully.

fields.title: Network Security Report
fields.description: Write a 1500-word report on network security covering: common attacks (DoS, MITM, phishing), firewalls, VPN, SSL/TLS, best practices. Include a network diagram showing security layers.

fields.title: Exploratory Data Analysis Project
fields.description: Perform complete EDA on the Titanic dataset (from Kaggle or seaborn). Include: (1) data loading & overview, (2) missing value analysis and handling, (3) univariate and bivariate analysis, (4) correlation heatmap, (5) key insights and conclusions. Submit Jupyter notebook.

fields.title: Data Visualization Dashboard
fields.description: Create a data visualization report using Matplotlib and Seaborn on any real-world dataset of your choice. Include at least 8 different types of charts with proper titles, labels, and interpretation. Save all plots as high-resolution images.

fields.title: Statistics & Hypothesis Testing
fields.description: Using Python: (1) Calculate all descriptive statistics for a given dataset, (2) Plot normal distribution curves, (3) Perform t-test to compare two groups, (4) Interpret p-values and conclusions. Use scipy.stats library.

fields.title: ML Classification Model
fields.description: Train and evaluate 3 classification models (Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest) on the Iris or any suitable dataset using scikit-learn. Compare: accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score. Plot confusion matrix for each. Submit Jupyter notebook with complete analysis.

fields.title: Regression Analysis Project
fields.description: Build a linear regression model to predict house prices or any regression problem. Include: data preprocessing, feature selection, model training, evaluation (MSE, RMSE, R²), residual plots. Compare with Random Forest Regressor.

fields.title: Clustering & Dimensionality Reduction
fields.description: Apply K-Means clustering to a customer segmentation dataset. Use elbow method to choose K. Visualize clusters using PCA (2D). Interpret each cluster. Also implement hierarchical clustering and compare results.

fields.title: Dynamic Programming Problem Set
fields.description:
Solve 5 DP problems with full code and complexity analysis:
1. Fibonacci (bottom-up tabulation)
2. 0/1 Knapsack Problem
3. Longest Common Subsequence
4. Coin Change (minimum coins)
5. Matrix Chain Multiplication
For each: state the recurrence relation, show DP table, code in Python, state time & space complexity.

fields.title: Graph Algorithm Implementation
fields.description:
Implement the following graph algorithms in Python:
1. Dijkstra's Shortest Path
2. Bellman-Ford Algorithm
3. Prim's MST
4. Kruskal's MST
5. Topological Sort (DFS-based)
Use adjacency list representation. Test each on a weighted graph with at least 7 nodes.

fields.title: Advanced Data Structures Implementation
fields.description:
Implement in Python:
1. Min-Heap with insert, extract-min, and heapify
2. Trie with insert, search, and starts_with
3. Segment Tree for range sum query and point update
Include time complexity analysis and test cases for each.

fields.title: Concurrent Web Scraper
fields.description:
Build a concurrent web scraper using asyncio and aiohttp that:
1. Accepts a list of 10 URLs
2. Fetches all pages concurrently (not sequentially)
3. Extracts title and first paragraph from each page
4. Saves results to a JSON file
5. Measures and reports total time vs sequential approach
Compare performance between sequential requests and asyncio.

fields.title: Design Patterns Implementation
fields.description:
Implement 5 design patterns in Python with real-world examples:
1. Singleton – Database connection manager
2. Factory – Shape creator (Circle, Rectangle, Triangle)
3. Observer – Event notification system
4. Decorator – Function timing and logging wrappers
5. Strategy – Sorting algorithm selector
Include UML diagrams and unit tests for each pattern.

fields.title: REST API Client Application
fields.description:
Build a Python application that:
1. Fetches data from a public REST API (e.g., OpenWeatherMap, JSONPlaceholder, or PokeAPI)
2. Handles authentication and error responses
3. Parses JSON responses into Python dataclasses
4. Stores results in a local SQLite database
5. Provides a simple CLI menu (view, search, refresh data)
Use type hints throughout.

fields.title: Full-Stack CRUD App with Django REST + React
fields.description:
Build a full-stack Student Notes application:
Backend: Django REST Framework API (CRUD for notes: create, list, update, delete)
Frontend: React.js consuming the API via fetch/axios
Features: Add note, view all notes, edit note, delete note, search notes
Auth: Simple token authentication
Deploy both on the same machine with CORS configured.

fields.title: E-Commerce Product Listing Page
fields.description:
Build a responsive product listing page:
1. Static product data (at least 12 products with name, price, category, image URL, rating)
2. Filter by category and price range
3. Sort by price (low-high, high-low) and rating
4. Add to cart functionality with cart count badge
5. Responsive grid layout (Bootstrap or CSS Grid)
Pure HTML + CSS + Vanilla JavaScript. No frameworks.

fields.title: Progressive Web App (PWA)
fields.description:
Convert an existing web app into a PWA:
1. Add a Web App Manifest (name, icons, theme color)
2. Implement a Service Worker for offline caching
3. Cache static assets and API responses
4. Add install prompt
5. Test offline functionality using Chrome DevTools
Document steps and screenshots in a report.

fields.title: Wireshark Packet Analysis Lab
fields.description:
Capture and analyse network traffic using Wireshark:
1. Capture HTTP and HTTPS traffic while browsing a website
2. Identify the TCP three-way handshake packets
3. Analyse a DNS query-response pair
4. Find and explain at least one ICMP packet
5. Use display filters to isolate specific traffic
Submit screenshots with detailed explanations for each step.

fields.title: Network Design Project
fields.description:
Design a complete network for a 3-floor office building:
1. Floor plan with device placement
2. IP addressing scheme with subnetting
3. VLAN configuration for departments (HR, IT, Management)
4. Router, switch and firewall placement
5. Security policies (ACL rules)
Submit network diagram (using Cisco Packet Tracer or draw.io) + detailed documentation.

fields.title: Multi-Threaded Chat Application
fields.description:
Build a multi-client chat server in Python:
1. Server handles multiple clients concurrently using threads
2. Clients can send messages to all (broadcast) or specific users (private)
3. Server logs all messages with timestamps
4. Clients can join/leave gracefully
5. Simple username registration on connect
Use Python socket and threading modules.

fields.title: SQL Data Analysis Project
fields.description:
Using SQLite or PostgreSQL:
1. Design a database schema for an e-commerce dataset (customers, orders, products)
2. Write 10 SQL queries: basic SELECT, JOINs, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions
3. Find: top 5 customers by revenue, monthly sales trend, product category analysis
4. Export results to Pandas for visualisation
5. Create 4 charts showing key business insights

fields.title: End-to-End Data Science Pipeline
fields.description:
Build a complete data science pipeline for a real dataset:
1. Data ingestion and validation
2. Automated EDA report (using pandas-profiling or sweetviz)
3. Feature engineering (encoding, scaling, new features)
4. Model training with Pipeline + GridSearchCV
5. Model evaluation and SHAP feature importance plot
6. Save model with joblib and create a prediction function
Document each step in a Jupyter notebook.

fields.title: Interactive Data Dashboard
fields.description:
Build an interactive analytics dashboard using Plotly and Dash:
1. Load and display a dataset (student performance or sales data)
2. At least 5 interactive charts (line, bar, scatter, pie, heatmap)
3. Dropdown or slider to filter/control charts
4. Key metric cards at the top
5. Clean professional layout
Host locally and record a short demo video.

fields.title: Deep Learning Image Classifier
fields.description:
Build an image classifier using TensorFlow/Keras:
1. Use CIFAR-10 or Fashion-MNIST dataset
2. Build a CNN architecture (Conv→Pool→Conv→Pool→Flatten→Dense)
3. Train with data augmentation
4. Plot training/validation accuracy and loss curves
5. Evaluate with confusion matrix and classification report
6. Try transfer learning with MobileNetV2 and compare results

fields.title: ML Model Deployment API
fields.description:
Deploy a trained machine learning model as a REST API:
1. Train a classification model (any dataset) and save with joblib
2. Build a FastAPI or Flask API with /predict endpoint
3. Accept JSON input with feature values
4. Return prediction, confidence score, and feature importance
5. Add input validation and error handling
6. Write API documentation using Swagger/OpenAPI
7. Containerise with Docker

fields.title: NLP Sentiment Analysis System
fields.description:
Build a complete NLP pipeline for sentiment analysis:
1. Dataset: IMDB reviews or Twitter sentiment
2. Preprocessing: tokenisation, stop word removal, lemmatisation
3. Feature extraction: TF-IDF and Word2Vec embeddings
4. Train: Logistic Regression, SVM, and a simple LSTM
5. Compare all three models on accuracy, F1, and inference speed
6. Build a simple web interface (Flask) to analyse user input text

fields.title: Assignment 1: Implement a Stack using Array
fields.description: Implement push, pop, peek, and isEmpty operations for a stack using a Python list. Submit a .py file with a working Stack class and test cases.

fields.title: Assignment 2: Linked List Operations
fields.description: Implement a singly linked list with insert, delete, and reverse methods.

fields.title: Assignment 1: File Handling & Exception Handling
fields.description: Write a Python program that reads a CSV file, processes data, and handles FileNotFoundError and ValueError exceptions gracefully.

fields.title: Assignment 2: OOP – Bank Account System
fields.description: Design a BankAccount class with deposit, withdraw, and statement methods using OOP principles (encapsulation, inheritance).

fields.title: Assignment 1: Personal Portfolio Page
fields.description: Build a responsive HTML/CSS personal portfolio page with sections for About, Skills, Projects, and Contact.

fields.title: Assignment 2: JavaScript To-Do App
fields.description: Create a to-do list web app using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript with add, complete, and delete functionality.

fields.title: Assignment 1: Network Topology Design
fields.description: Design a star, bus, and ring topology diagram for a 10-node network. Explain advantages and disadvantages of each.

fields.title: Assignment 2: Socket Programming
fields.description: Write a simple TCP client-server program in Python that exchanges messages.

fields.title: Assignment 1: Exploratory Data Analysis
fields.description: Perform EDA on the Titanic dataset using Pandas and Matplotlib. Identify missing values, distributions, and correlations.

fields.title: Assignment 2: Data Cleaning Pipeline
fields.description: Build a reusable data cleaning function that handles missing values, outliers, and type conversion for tabular datasets.

fields.title: Assignment 1: Linear Regression from Scratch
fields.description: Implement linear regression using gradient descent in Python without using scikit-learn. Evaluate on the Boston Housing dataset.

fields.title: Assignment 2: Classification with Scikit-learn
fields.description: Train, evaluate, and compare Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, and Random Forest classifiers on the Iris dataset.
